title: coap_client.c: OSCORE PIV extraction silently fails on parse error
notes: Commit: 75da64649 - PIV extraction now fails the request with LICHEN_COAP_ERR_OSCORE_PROTECT if parse fails, no PIV, or bad length. Prevents silent unprotect failures later. Added error logging.
close_reason: PIV extraction failure now treated as error (commit 75da64649). Correctness fixed for OSCORE request/response pairing.
